spec.name: The Light Cave
spec.description: You are in a light cave, through a hole large above you, you see the sky. A small tunnel to the south is the only way out. You notice the source of the strange smell, all around you there are corpses of several monsters.

extra_descs.description: Looking at the corpses lying around the cave, they all appear to have been torn to shreds by some large creature. As a further not too unexpected point to note, they all smell terrible.
